nasb.text: I will not be afraid of ten thousands of people Who have set themselves against me round about.

esv.text: I will not be afraid of many thousands of people who have set themselves against me all around.

cnv.text: 雖有千萬人包圍攻擊我， 我也不怕。

ccb.text: 我虽被千万仇敌围困， 也不会惧怕。

csbs.text: 纵有万千民众四围列阵攻击我，我也不害怕。
